criteria.description: Recognizes that the entrypoint owns no independent branching or business behavior and does not select an automated behavior test.
Selects shell syntax validation and image build or packaged-path evidence for the changed contract.
Uses the available deployment dry-run for platform acceptance rather than manufacturing an E2E journey.
Names application startup or configuration parsing as residual unless a narrow existing smoke is available.

forbidden.description: Adds or recommends a unit test that merely greps the script or mocks the app to assert argv.
Requires an integration or E2E suite solely for the literal path edit.
